name: stage-hero
description: Atmosphärisches Hero-Bild für Opener und Chapter-Opener auf der Bühne (dunkler Hintergrund)
style_instructions: Style: Cinematic atmospheric composition, soft volumetric lighting, editorial magazine aesthetic, painterly textures. Color palette: muted earth tones, deep shadows, single warm accent. Mood: dignified, calm, professional.
composition: Strong negative space in upper-left 40% for title overlay. Subject anchored lower-right or centered-low. Mid-tone to darker values dominate. Horizon line (if present) at lower 1/3.
negative: no text, no logos, no people's faces visible, no cartoon style, no 3D rendering, no stock-photo look, no AI-glow artifacts, no children's book illustration
